## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this PR do and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds capability)
- [ ] Breaking change (existing agents / clients / DB schema need to migrate)
- [ ] Documentation only

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change (bug fix → regression test that
      fails on `main`; new feature → at least one happy-path test)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under "Unreleased" if user-visible
- [ ] Updated `docs/` if public API changed (HTTP route, WS event, client method)

## Related

<!-- Link related issues / PRs: "Fixes #123", "Refs #456". -->

<!-- For breaking changes, write the migration steps here so reviewers can
     see them upfront. -->
